mapper.sql: id,username, password, real_name, avatar, role, last_login_time, last_login_ip, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM admin ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT FROM admin WHERE username = #{username} LIMIT 1

SELECT
FROM admin WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin ( username, password, real_name, avatar, role, last_login_time, last_login_ip, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{lastLoginTime}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )

INSERT INTO admin ( username, password, real_name, avatar, role, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES
( #{item.username}, #{item.password}, #{item.realName}, #{item.avatar}, #{item.role}, #{item.status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE admin SET password = #{newPassword}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE admin SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM admin WHERE id IN
#{id}
